body: So I moved toREMOVEDand I applied to get my cannabis card through NuggMD and I paid for a  3 year medical card. They sent me a California license without my consent. I did not have my Nevada license at the time so they decided themselves to mail me a CA medical card to my Nevada address. If thats not enough to complain about. I cannot use this card inREMOVEDorREMOVEDand have had it for 5 months. I asked for a correction and they offered me a $75 credit for this fREMOVEDk up after I spent $300. $75 isnt even going to cover 1 year for a NV license. I cant get my meds out here bc Im from NE and myREMOVEDcant prescribe me meds inREMOVED. This is so wrong on so many levels.Business ResponseDate:03/16/2026REMOVEDapplied inREMOVEDwithoutREMOVEDID. The system is set up to send them to CA if they answer no to theREMOVEDID questions, asREMOVEDwill accept a CA recommendation as long as they use the card and not the recommendation letter. He decided to wait over 5 months to reach out and says he did not want or cannot use the CA one. Had he reached out sooner once he received the card and letter in the mail, we could have addressed and refunded then.The $75 credit we offered is already a meaningful accommodation given how much time has passed since the original purchase. At this point, its been five months, so were limited in what we can do beyond the credit already provided.Once you have your Nevada ID, please reach out and well be glad to help you move forward with the Nevada process.Customer AnswerDate:03/16/2026Complaint: 24635429I am rejecting this response because: Show me one place that will accept the CA card. Regardless of the time that passed for me to try and use the card at various places just to be told no they dont accent the card without a California license. As I see in all the complaints. The companyREMOVEDblame on its customers. You issued me a card that I havent been able to use whether it was 5 days, or 5 months is arbitrary. You sold me something without knowing whether it was accepted or not, and now trying to give me credit that wouldnt even get me a card final cost. Taking peoples money is a scam.SincerelREMOVEDBusiness ResponseDate:03/23/2026Hello again,Nevada will accept the California recommendation as long as you present theREMOVEDcard rather than the letter. Weve had many patientsboth CA and NV residentsuse it successfully, and as far as we can tell, youve been using it without issue for the past five months.If you had reached out at the time you were approved, we would have been able to issue a full refund then. At this point, too much time has passed, and the $75 credit we offered is already more than fair.Customer AnswerDate:03/23/2026Complaint: 24635429I am rejecting this response because:I wouldnt go through all this trouble if I could use the license. WITHOUT A CALIFORNIA LICENSE NEVADA WILL NOT TAKE THE CARD. All the money I spent should be refunded. Ridiculous. Unprofessional. Knows nothing about NV rules obviously.Sincerely,REMOVED

body:
Signed up on the site to get my medical card, and it said that they had "Same day physician access", and that "Our medical cannabis doctors are available online from 8:00am-10:00pm (PST & EST) 7 days a week!".

After signing up I try to do the consultation numerous times and it just told me, "Your doctor is currently offline. Please try again later". So I contacted support and it took them about an hour to get back to me when their support says 3 minutes. I was told that the New Mexico doctor is out on an emergency and to try back tomorrow. So I try back the next day and get the same doctor offline. I try to reach out to support yet again and get told their doctor isn't available on these days and to try back Monday. I talked to support again and get told that not all states have same day access and doctors available 7 days a week.

So make sure you check with them prior to signing up if you're expecting same-day appointment. Once I got the appointment though it was a quick and easy process to get the rest of the process done.

So what happened to to the $49 price on Original Marijuana that led me to NuggMD and the supposed extra $15 discount??? Once I got approved the email then stated, "Keep in mind, you required to complete a follow up appointment in 3 months, with a price of $50 for the follow up." body: Complaint:This service completely failed me during what should have been a simple medical card renewal. I was kicked out of the virtual waiting room within seconds every time I tried to join. I followed every step, stayed on the correct page, provided multiple screenshots, and reached out to support as soon as the issueREMOVEDfirst claimed I left the room  I hadnt. I contacted them because their system wasnt working. Instead of owning the issue, they pushed the blame on me. They even told me directly that the doctor would call me  but no call ever came. That one step couldve fixed everything. They had my number. They acknowledged it. And then they simply refused to call.Instead, they denied my renewal without a single attempt to speak to me. No contact, no evaluation, no humanity. Just a cold rejection based on broken tech and falseREMOVEDmake matters worse, I was told I wouldnt be charged. That was a lie. I showed proof I was. They called it pending, ignoring the fact that the money was already deducted.This was a total breakdown of a basic process. A call couldve resolved everything, but instead I was gaslit, blamed, and denied care without cause. As a 100% disabled veteran, I deserved better. What I got was negligence and disrespect.If you see a glowing review for this service, its either written by a paid shill, a company plant, or someone whos never actually used it. No real customer could call this anything but a disaster.claiming that this service is any more than "inexcusable" is a planted review or a paid employee pretending to give these fake reviewsBusiness ResponseDate:05/08/2025I am genuinely sorry for the frustrating experience you had when seeking certification through our service. Our team's communication while you were trying to connect with a provider could have been clearer and we regret that you felt that any blame was being placed on you, the patient. We are providing additional coaching to our team to ensure we handle situations like these with more clarity and care moving forward.I can also confirm that the hold placed on your card was voided from our end and should have dropped from your banking record by the end of the business day. If youre still seeing anything pending or have other questions, please reach out toREMOVEDwell make sure youre taken care of. Additionally, if you'd still like to speak with a provider, wed be more than happy to help get you reassigned and support you through that process.Were so sorry again for the stress and confusion caused, and we appreciate you taking the time to share your experience. Please reach out if there is anything at all that we can help with. We'd be glad to assist in any way we can.

body: NuggMD online is a big joke! Booked an appointment 4 days in advance, drove and hour and a half and the doctor wasn't even there, nor did NuggMD even bother to schedule the appointment! Knew the doctor was going to be out at my appointment time yet no one reached out to me via, phone, text, or email. Was promised a call back in 3 days which never came either. Took my money, have tied it up now for 2 weeks while I await a full refund. Nothing but excuses and blaming everything on the doctor when it was clearly their fault! They are only in it for the money. Wasted my time, gas and patience on this company and nothing to show for it.   I was even told by staff that I wasn't the only one this happened to, as there were 2 others that day who didn't see a doctor either. They told me this happens all the time. The whole thing sounds like a scam to get your money. I'm willing to bet most of these reviews here are fake or paid reviews. THE ENTIRE OPERATION STINKS OF RED FLAGS! What I really don't like is now they have all my vital information and I have nothing!! Do yourself a favor if you want a Medical Marijuana Card, go local not some fly by night online company. Horrible, Horrible experience. You have to wonder about a company that has no phone support, or is unwilling to call you when there's a problem. NEGATIVE STARS IN MY BOOK!!

body:
It was a very quick process and the phone call was probably about 5 minutes long. Perhaps my call was shorter than it was for others because I was renewing my existing card/membership. I appreciated being asked if my primary care provider was aware that I was in the program and said yes. I’ll happily use NuggMD in the future.

One concern I have is that some users may enroll in the medical cannabis program without having a formal sit down with their own MD first. Some users have children who need the full attention of their parents and should be counseled by their physicians on when to use cannabis and when to abstain. Driving after smoking should be a conversation to have with the physician as should various other treatments like physical therapy.

NuggMD  is great for renewing your existing membership in the program, but I believe that, since it’s a medical use program, there should be counseling and discussion before using for the first time. Most people have access to recreational cannabis through dispensaries and have the personal freedom to use or not.

body: This was my 5th renewal and certainly will be my last. Previous 4 times, I’ve only even had a call from a 2 times counting this last time. Normally disconnects and it’s just approved anyway. The 24 hours used to be 10-15 minutes but now is an advertisement scam more than anything. Completed my doctor visit at 0800. At 1100 I had messaged asking is this was normal as it never had been. Was told I’d get it later that day. 2200 rolls around, all OCM shops are closed and I message back to cancel it. Most dispensaries now offer carts for half of this and you walk out with cert and product if you’d like. After messaging, she agreed to cancel and the magically my certification was in my profile although I had looked 30 seconds before. Asked to speak to a manager and was told I’ll get an email. No email. Also they date it to the day you had your doctors visit. FAQ says it can take up to 7 business days. That’s a week they are stealing from your cert. look around for ten minutes and guarantee you can find a better deal on life well alone. 89 dollar certs, same day and no shadiness when trying to cancel. Googled cannabis cert discount and first one too pop up is attached. And attached is chat transcript of me asking to have it cancelled before receiving cert and them uploading cert so I cannot cancel.  PLEASE TAKE 5 MINUTES AND GOOGLE! So much better deals.

body:
Getting a medical marijuana card in WV seemed a bit daunting to me at first, so I decided to reach out to my local dispensary. Fortunately for me they recommended Nuggmd. The website was quite intuitive, and the process was streamlined. I want to say that it only took me maybe 5 minutes of filling out the form before joining the queue to speak to a physician. My wait time for the physician was about 15 minutes. My physician was professional, friendly, patient, and attentive. He went over my form, and after asking some questions was able to give me a recommendation before we completed our appointment. From there, I was sent an email with further instruction on how to complete my states form. 
This is about as easy as it gets, and I would recommend this site to anybody.

body: July 2, 2023REMOVEDI had a tele visit with a MD for my medical marijuana card on 6/24. Everything was fine, and my doctor assigned me a temporary card expires 7/7.  My issue is that I havent received my medical marijuana card in the mail yet. If sure Im not the only person to complain, but the company, NUGG MD, needs to step it up and get their act together. Please contact them, and ask them to resolve this problem. It is not right. I paid promptly and expect them to provide my card just as promptly.REMOVEDBusiness ResponseDate:08/03/2023Hi thereREMOVED, we do understand the frustration that you may be experiencing. However, NuggMD does not have control over the cannabis control commissions turnaround times on shipping out theREMOVEDcards.REMOVEDdoes not directly create theseREMOVEDcards, rather, the provider that evaluates you does register you with the state and from there, the state then reviews/approves and prints/ships out yourREMOVEDcard. The state does quote an average of 10 business days but notes that it can take up to 30 business days. I will attach some information from the state's website below:Where is my Medical Use of Marijuana ProgramREMOVEDcard?Patients and Caregivers should anticipate an average of at least two weeks time from the date of their registration approval from theREMOVED(Commission), to receiving the physical Patient or Caregiver ProgramREMOVEDcard.Several common mistakes may delay the issuance of a ProgramREMOVEDcard:Failing to fully submit the registration application to the Commission.When applying for a ProgramREMOVEDcard, be sure to fully complete your application and select submit. It is a common mistake to not fully submit the application.Forgetting to include an apartment or unit number in your address when you submit your application.Please check to ensure that all the information is filled out in the application address fields.Mistaking ProgramREMOVEDcards for junk mail.ProgramREMOVEDcards will arrive in a plain, white envelope that often gets mistaken for junk mail. While you are waiting for your card, be sure to open all your mail. The envelope containing your card will list the Commissions address in the upper left-hand corner:REMOVEDREMOVEDAlso, here is their contact info if you are still having issues with yourREMOVEDcard shipment from the state.Medical Use of Marijuana ProgramREMOVEDMedical Program phone line hours:10:00 a.m.-3:00 p.m., Monday-FridayREMOVED
